pages.title: Path Towards a Settlement
pages.text: You've made a &abone axe&r! It is time to obtain the &cfirewood&r for your first campfire, which will start your first settlement!

pages.title: The chopping stump
pages.text:
&b{key:key.use}&r on a lone log with your &4bone axe&r to create a &6chopping stump!&r

Place logs on it, and &b{key:key.use}&r with your bone axe to chop them into &cfirewood&r.

pages.title: The founding campfire
pages.text:
&b{key:key.use}&r with 4 firewood on a spot on the ground where you'll want to found your &6settlement&r. 

When the campfire is ready, &b{key:key.use}&r to open the menu and found your &6settlement&r!
